global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with product icons and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting affordable products with a strong call to action.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background that fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A simple and modern logo text 'LuxShelf' displayed prominently at the top in a bold font.

elements.label: Product icons
elements.description: Two minimalistic icons representing products, displayed in the center with a clean and simple design.

elements.label: Product icons
elements.description: Another set of two minimalistic icons representing products, positioned slightly below the first set, maintaining a cohesive look.

elements.label: Favorite pick text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your next favorite pick' in a large, eye-catching font, centered below the product icons.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in a white font against a rounded background, located at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick $4.99e 25 Order now

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge with the text 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: Text displaying the price '$4.99' in a large, bold font, located just below the body text.

embedding_texts.global_text: LuxShelf, unknown, native, bright and modern, featuring a logo, product icons, and a call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by product icons in the center, with the headline and price text below, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your next favorite pick, $4.99, free shipping over $25, Order now, LuxShelf, SALE
